name: Healthcare WhatsApp AI Assistant - Free Stack

parameters.subject: =🏥 New Appointment: {{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response & Update Session').first().json.appointmentPayload.patient_name }} - {{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response & Update Session').first().json.appointmentPayload.appointment_date }} at {{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response & Update Session').first().json.appointmentPayload.appointment_time }}

parameters.start: ={{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response & Update Session').first().json.appointmentPayload.appointment_date }}T{{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response & Update Session').first().json.appointmentPayload.appointment_time.replace(' ', 'T') }}:00
parameters.end: ={{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response & Update Session').first().json.appointmentPayload.appointment_date }}T{{ $('⚙️ Parse AI Response & Update Session').first().json.appointmentPayload.appointment_time.replace(' ', 'T') }}:00

parameters.subject: =🚨 HealthFirst Bot Error - {{ new Date().toISOString() }}
